name: create_task
description: Create a new task in a specified ClickUp list. You must provide the list ID and task name. Optionally set description (supports Markdown), assignees, priority (1=urgent, 2=high, 3=normal, 4=low), due date, tags, status, time estimate, and custom field values.

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: The ID of the list to create the task in.

parameters.name: description
parameters.example: Create high-fidelity mockups for the new landing page based on the wireframes in Figma.

parameters.name: assignees
parameters.description: Array of user IDs (integers) to assign to the task.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status to set for the task. Must match an existing status in the list.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority level: 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Normal, 4 = Low, null = No priority.

parameters.name: due_date
parameters.description: Due date as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Array of tag names to add to the task.

body.name: Design landing page mockup
body.description: Create high-fidelity mockups for the new landing page based on the wireframes in Figma.

body.name: Design landing page mockup
body.text_content: Create high-fidelity mockups for the new landing page based on the wireframes in Figma.
body.description: Create high-fidelity mockups for the new landing page based on the wireframes in Figma.
